mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT C.name as name , C.longCalYn as longCalYn , B.lavelNo as lavelNo , B.machineNumber as machineNumber , A.id , A.deviceIdx , A.currentDateTime , A.location , A.pileNo , A.pileStandard , A.drillingDepth , A.intrusionDepth , A.balance , A.connectLength , A.managedStandard , A.avgPenetrationValue , A.totalPenetrationValue , A.hammaT , A.fallMeter , A.pileType , A.method , A.totalConnectWidth , A.ultimateBearingCapacity , A.crossSection , A.hammaEfficiency , A.modulusElasticity , A.isDel, IF(A.bigo = 'null','',A.bigo) as bigo, A.createDate , case when @grp = date_format(A.currentDateTime, '%Y-%m-%d') then @rownum:=@rownum + 1 else @rownum :=1 end as rownum, (@grp := date_format(A.currentDateTime, '%Y-%m-%d')) as dum FROM TB_REPORT_ORIGIN A , TB_DEVICE B, TB_CONSTRUCTION C , (select @rownum:=0, @grp:='') r
ORDER BY A.createDate desc) as TB where 1=1
and rownum = 1
and currentDateTime = curdate()
and currentDateTime = #{param.date}

SELECT (select count(*) from TB_REPORT_ORIGIN WHERE TB_REPORT_ORIGIN.deviceIdx = TB.deviceIdx and TB_REPORT_ORIGIN.pileNo = TB.pileNo and TB_REPORT_ORIGIN.location = TB.location and TB_REPORT_ORIGIN.isDel = 0) as duplicated, name , longCalYn , lavelNo , machineNumber , id , deviceIdx , currentDateTime , location , pileNo , pileStandard , drillingDepth , intrusionDepth , balance , connectLength , managedStandard , avgPenetrationValue , totalPenetrationValue , hammaT , fallMeter , pileType , method , totalConnectWidth , ultimateBearingCapacity , crossSection , hammaEfficiency , modulusElasticity , createDate, isDel, isDuple,
todayConstruction,
'0' as todayConstruction,
'0' as todayConstruction,
bigo, sprCol1 FROM ( SELECT C.name as name , C.longCalYn , B.lavelNo as lavelNo , B.machineNumber as machineNumber , A.id , A.deviceIdx , A.currentDateTime , A.location , A.pileNo , A.pileStandard , A.drillingDepth , A.intrusionDepth , A.balance , A.connectLength , A.managedStandard , A.avgPenetrationValue , A.totalPenetrationValue , A.hammaT , A.fallMeter , A.pileType , A.method , A.totalConnectWidth , A.ultimateBearingCapacity , A.crossSection , A.hammaEfficiency , A.modulusElasticity , A.isDel, A.isDuple, IF(A.bigo = 'null','',A.bigo) as bigo , IF(A.sprCol1 = 'null','',A.sprCol1) as sprCol1 , A.createDate ,
A.todayConstruction,
'0' as todayConstruction,
'0' as todayConstruction,
case when @grp = date_format(A.currentDateTime, '%Y-%m-%d') then @rownum:=@rownum + 1 else @rownum :=1 end as rownum, (@grp := date_format(A.currentDateTime, '%Y-%m-%d')) as dum
FROM
(SELECT B.todayConstruction, A.* FROM TB_REPORT_ORIGIN A , (SELECT currentDateTime, COUNT(*) AS todayConstruction FROM (SELECT currentDateTime, deviceIdx, pileNo, location, COUNT(*) FROM TB_REPORT_ORIGIN
AND isDel = 0 GROUP BY currentDateTime , deviceIdx , pileNo , location) AA GROUP BY currentDateTime ORDER BY currentDateTime DESC) B
AND A.currentDateTime = B.currentDateTime) A ,
TB_REPORT_ORIGIN A ,
TB_REPORT_ORIGIN A ,
TB_DEVICE B, TB_CONSTRUCTION C , (select @rownum:=0, @grp:='') r
ORDER BY A.createDate desc ) as TB where 1=1
and rownum = 1
and currentDateTime = curdate()
and currentDateTime = #{param.date}
ORDER BY createDate DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{startRow}

SELECT (select count(*) from TB_REPORT_ORIGIN WHERE TB_REPORT_ORIGIN.deviceIdx = TB.deviceIdx and TB_REPORT_ORIGIN.pileNo = TB.pileNo and TB_REPORT_ORIGIN.location = TB.location and TB_REPORT_ORIGIN.isDel = 0) as duplicated, name , lavelNo , machineNumber , id , deviceIdx , currentDateTime , location , pileNo , pileStandard , drillingDepth , intrusionDepth , balance , connectLength , managedStandard , avgPenetrationValue , totalPenetrationValue , hammaT , fallMeter , pileType , method , totalConnectWidth , ultimateBearingCapacity , crossSection , hammaEfficiency , modulusElasticity , createDate , role, isDel, bigo, sprCol1 FROM ( SELECT C.name as name , B.lavelNo as lavelNo , B.machineNumber as machineNumber , A.id , A.deviceIdx , A.currentDateTime , A.location , A.pileNo , A.pileStandard , A.drillingDepth , A.intrusionDepth , A.balance , A.connectLength , A.managedStandard , A.avgPenetrationValue , A.totalPenetrationValue , A.hammaT , A.fallMeter , A.pileType , A.method , A.isDel, A.totalConnectWidth , A.ultimateBearingCapacity , A.crossSection , A.hammaEfficiency , A.modulusElasticity , A.createDate , C.role , IF(A.bigo = 'null','',A.bigo) as bigo , IF(A.sprCol1 = 'null','',A.sprCol1) as sprCol1 , case when @grp = date_format(A.createDate, '%Y-%m-%d') then @rownum:=@rownum + 1 else @rownum :=1 end as rownum, (@grp := date_format(A.currentDateTime, '%Y-%m-%d')) as dum FROM TB_REPORT_ORIGIN A , TB_DEVICE B, TB_CONSTRUCTION C , (select @rownum:=0, @grp:='') r
ORDER BY A.createDate asc ) as TB where 1=1
and rownum = 1
and currentDateTime = curdate()
and currentDateTime = #{param.date}
ORDER BY createDate ASC

SELECT (select count(*) from TB_REPORT_ORIGIN WHERE TB_REPORT_ORIGIN.deviceIdx = TB.deviceIdx and TB_REPORT_ORIGIN.pileNo = TB.pileNo and TB_REPORT_ORIGIN.location = TB.location and TB_REPORT_ORIGIN.isDel = 0) as duplicated, name , lavelNo , machineNumber , id , deviceIdx , currentDateTime , location , pileNo , pileStandard , drillingDepth , intrusionDepth , balance , connectLength , managedStandard , avgPenetrationValue , totalPenetrationValue , hammaT , fallMeter , pileType , method , totalConnectWidth , ultimateBearingCapacity , crossSection , hammaEfficiency , modulusElasticity , createDate , role, isDel, bigo, sprCol1, peOne, peTwo, peThree, peFour, peFive, peSix, peSeven, peEight, peNine, peTen, piOne, piTwo, piThree, piFour, piFive FROM ( SELECT C.name as name , B.lavelNo as lavelNo , B.machineNumber as machineNumber , A.id , A.deviceIdx , A.currentDateTime , A.location , A.pileNo , A.pileStandard , A.drillingDepth , A.intrusionDepth , A.balance , A.connectLength , A.managedStandard , A.avgPenetrationValue , A.totalPenetrationValue , A.hammaT , A.fallMeter , A.pileType , A.method , A.isDel, A.totalConnectWidth , A.ultimateBearingCapacity , A.crossSection , A.hammaEfficiency , A.modulusElasticity , (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION_ORIGIN WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 0,1) as peOne, (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION_ORIGIN WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 1,1) as peTwo, (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION_ORIGIN WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 2,1) as peThree, (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION_ORIGIN WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 3,1) as peFour, (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION_ORIGIN WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 4,1) as peFive, (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION_ORIGIN WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 5,1) as peSix, (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION_ORIGIN WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 6,1) as peSeven, (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION_ORIGIN WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 7,1) as peEight, (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION_ORIGIN WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 8,1) as peNine, (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION_ORIGIN WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 9,1) as peTen , ifnull((SELECT IF(VALUE = 0, '', VALUE) as VALUE FROM TB_PIECE_ORIGIN WHERE reportIdx = A.id and name = "단본"),'') as piOne, ifnull((SELECT IF(VALUE = 0, '', VALUE) as VALUE FROM TB_PIECE_ORIGIN WHERE reportIdx = A.id and name = "하단"),'') as piTwo, ifnull((SELECT IF(VALUE = 0, '', VALUE) as VALUE FROM TB_PIECE_ORIGIN WHERE reportIdx = A.id and name = "중단" LIMIT 0,1),'') as piThree, ifnull((SELECT IF(VALUE = 0, '', VALUE) as VALUE FROM TB_PIECE_ORIGIN WHERE reportIdx = A.id and name = "중단" LIMIT 1,1),'') as piFour, ifnull((SELECT IF(VALUE = 0, '', VALUE) as VALUE FROM TB_PIECE_ORIGIN WHERE reportIdx = A.id and name = "상단"),'') as piFive, A.createDate, C.role , IF(A.bigo = 'null','',A.bigo) as bigo , IF(A.sprCol1 = 'null','',A.sprCol1) as sprCol1 , case when @grp = date_format(A.createDate, '%Y-%m-%d') then @rownum:=@rownum + 1 else @rownum :=1 end as rownum, (@grp := date_format(A.currentDateTime, '%Y-%m-%d')) as dum FROM TB_REPORT_ORIGIN A , TB_DEVICE B, TB_CONSTRUCTION C , (select @rownum:=0, @grp:='') r
ORDER BY A.createDate asc ) as TB where 1=1
and rownum = 1
and currentDateTime = curdate()
and currentDateTime = #{param.date}
ORDER BY machineNumber , createDate ASC

SELECT (select count(*) from TB_REPORT_ORIGIN WHERE TB_REPORT_ORIGIN.deviceIdx = TB.deviceIdx and TB_REPORT_ORIGIN.pileNo = TB.pileNo and TB_REPORT_ORIGIN.location = TB.location and TB_REPORT_ORIGIN.isDel = 0) as duplicated, name , lavelNo , machineNumber , id , deviceIdx , currentDateTime , location , pileNo , pileStandard , drillingDepth , intrusionDepth , balance , connectLength , managedStandard , avgPenetrationValue , totalPenetrationValue , hammaT , fallMeter , pileType , method , totalConnectWidth , ultimateBearingCapacity , crossSection , hammaEfficiency , modulusElasticity , createDate , role, isDel, bigo, sprCol1, peOne, peTwo, peThree, peFour, peFive, piOne, piTwo, piThree, piFour, piFive FROM ( SELECT C.name as name , B.lavelNo as lavelNo , B.machineNumber as machineNumber , A.id , A.deviceIdx , A.currentDateTime , A.location , A.pileNo , A.pileStandard , A.drillingDepth , A.intrusionDepth , A.balance , A.connectLength , A.managedStandard , A.avgPenetrationValue , A.totalPenetrationValue , A.hammaT , A.fallMeter , A.pileType , A.method , A.isDel, A.totalConnectWidth , A.ultimateBearingCapacity , A.crossSection , A.hammaEfficiency , A.modulusElasticity , (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION_ORIGIN WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 0,1) as peOne, (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION_ORIGIN WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 1,1) as peTwo, (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION_ORIGIN WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 2,1) as peThree, (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION_ORIGIN WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 3,1) as peFour, (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION_ORIGIN WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 4,1) as peFive, ifnull((SELECT IF(VALUE = 0, '', VALUE) as VALUE FROM TB_PIECE_ORIGIN WHERE reportIdx = A.id and name = "단본"),'') as piOne, ifnull((SELECT IF(VALUE = 0, '', VALUE) as VALUE FROM TB_PIECE_ORIGIN WHERE reportIdx = A.id and name = "하단"),'') as piTwo, ifnull((SELECT IF(VALUE = 0, '', VALUE) as VALUE FROM TB_PIECE_ORIGIN WHERE reportIdx = A.id and name = "중단" LIMIT 0,1),'') as piThree, ifnull((SELECT IF(VALUE = 0, '', VALUE) as VALUE FROM TB_PIECE_ORIGIN WHERE reportIdx = A.id and name = "중단" LIMIT 1,1),'') as piFour, ifnull((SELECT IF(VALUE = 0, '', VALUE) as VALUE FROM TB_PIECE_ORIGIN WHERE reportIdx = A.id and name = "상단"),'') as piFive, A.createDate, C.role , IF(A.bigo = 'null','',A.bigo) as bigo , IF(A.sprCol1 = 'null','',A.sprCol1) as sprCol1 , case when @grp = date_format(A.createDate, '%Y-%m-%d') then @rownum:=@rownum + 1 else @rownum :=1 end as rownum, (@grp := date_format(A.currentDateTime, '%Y-%m-%d')) as dum FROM TB_REPORT_ORIGIN A , TB_DEVICE B, TB_CONSTRUCTION C , (select @rownum:=0, @grp:='') r
ORDER BY A.createDate asc ) as TB where 1=1
and rownum = 1
and currentDateTime = curdate()
and currentDateTime = #{param.date}
ORDER BY machineNumber , createDate ASC
